source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Big Pecks
abilities.flavor_text: Prevents the Pokémon from having its Defense stat lowered.

abilities.name: Super Luck
abilities.effect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.effect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's competitive spirit makes it deal more damage to Pokémon of the same gender, but less damage to Pokémon of the opposite gender.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.flavor_text: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.

abilities.name: Bulletproof
abilities.effect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.

abilities.name: Unnerve
abilities.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
abilities.flavor_text: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

abilities.name: Minds Eye
abilities.effect: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal-type and Fighting-type moves

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.effect: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

abilities.name: Unnerve
abilities.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
abilities.flavor_text: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

abilities.name: Unseen Fist
abilities.effect: Contact moves can strike through Protect/Detect.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.
